instruction: Generate a complete GROMACS workflow to calculate the density of pure water at 300 K and 1 bar.
expected_workflow: Generate water box using gmx solvate
Count water molecules and create topology
Run grompp and mdrun for energy minimization

common_errors_and_fixes.error: topol.top does not exist when using gmx solvate -p
common_errors_and_fixes.fix: Create topology manually after generating the water box and counting water molecules.

common_errors_and_fixes.error: Too many warnings due to Berendsen barostat
common_errors_and_fixes.fix: Use C-rescale barostat for NPT equilibration.
